data.title: Nexo fined $500K by CA regulator for issuing 5,500 loans without license, failing to assess repayment ability.
data.description: The financial regulator in California has alleged that Nexo provided around 5,500 loans to residents of California without a valid license. Furthermore, the company did not adequately evaluate the borrowers’ repayment capacities.

data.title: Crypto prices dip after bill stalls; BTC at $95,485.03, ETH $3,306.90, XRP $2.07, DOGE $0.1397; market selloff due to Senate opposition.
data.description: Leading cryptocurrencies experienced a dip following the stall of a key cryptocurrency bill in the Senate due to opposition from industry giants. Bitcoin was down 1.29% at $95,485.03, Ethereum dropped 0.82% to $3,306.90, XRP fell 2.66% to $2.07, Solana decreased by 2.75% to $142.06, and Dogecoin saw a decline of 4.23% to $0.1397. Bitcoin had hit a 2-month high of $97,000 before dropping, with its trading volume falling by 13% in 24 hours. The Senate Banking Committee postponed markup on the bill, causing sell-offs in the market. Cryptocurrency-related companies like Strategy Inc. and Coinbase Global Inc. closed down by 4.70% and 6.48%, respectively. Over $320 million was liquidated from the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Iran's crypto industry reaches $7.8 billion as protests surge. Bitcoin acts as a form of defiance, facilitating transactions in a tough economy.
data.description: According to Chainalysis, Bitcoin is serving as a symbol of resistance in Iran as it offers liquidity in a challenging economic setting.

data.title: AIxC's AIxC Hub reaches 500,000 registered wallets and 200,000 daily active participants in its first week post-launch.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, AIxCrypto Inc., trading on NASDAQ under the symbol AIXC, unveiled that their premier product, AIxC Hub, has exceeded half a million registered wallets and boasts a daily active user count of 200,000 in just one week. This places AIxC at the forefront of Embodied AI (EAI) infrastructure innovation.

data.title: SF Jewish Living campus hosts dinner party project for women with dementia, reviving memories through food and storytelling.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, in San Francisco, the San Francisco Campus for Jewish Living (SFCJL) is set to organize a unique dinner party. This event marks the completion of an innovative project aimed at triggering memories for women through the combination of food, scent, and storytelling.

data.title: Mayfair Gold filed a technical report for Fenn-Gib Gold Project on Jan. 15, 2026. (TSXV: MFG, OTCQX: MFGCF)
data.description: Mayfair Gold Corp. ("Mayfair") based in Vancouver, BC, recently disclosed the submission of a technical report in compliance with National Instrument 43-101. The report is in accordance with the Standards of Disclosure for Mineral and Stock Exchange Requirements. Mayfair Gold, traded on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker symbol MFG and on the OTCQX as MFGCF, made the announcement on Jan. 15, 2026.
